comments.commentary: Hell, it's Windowskey again. I was going to sleep after this song, but I pressed the window key again. Now I have to worship... I have to worship, even though I know I'll wake up completely when I start worshipping. That's the mission of the Windows key presser. JOAT on keyboard my love and my sadness... You have to worship immediately... I don't know what will happen if I don't worship you right now... If you don't worship for a minute or a second, you can't sleep...
